name: The Hoarder Next Door
overview: The Hoarder Next Door is a British documentary series about compulsive hoarding. Produced by Twenty Twenty and shown on Channel 4 it features psychotherapist Stelios Kiosses helping extreme hoarders. The show is narrated by Olivia Colman.

trailers.title: The Hoarder Next Door | Starts Monday, 9pm | Channel 4
